ticket.title: Kind-aware compound sub-ticket IDs (R011-B1/F2/T3)
handoff: Sub-ticket allocator in handle_claim (rs-hack/src/main.rs:4984-5015) always emits <parent>-T<n> and filters by that prefix — --kind is preserved only as @hack:kind(...), not in the ID letter. Request: single counter per relay, letter reflects kind (B/F/T). So opening a bug then a feature then a task under R011 yields R011-B1, R011-F2, R011-T3.

Implemented. Sub-ticket allocator in handle_claim now emits <parent>-<L><n> with L ∈ {B,F,T} from --kind, and the counter is unified across kinds per parent (rs-hack/src/main.rs:4992-5022). Widened hack-board/src/server.ts bareRelayOf regex to /^(R\\d+)-[BFT]\\d+$/. Added test_mixed_kind_compound_ids_all_infer_parent in ticket.rs — parent inference via split('-') is letter-agnostic so no changes needed elsewhere.
next_steps: P1: Widen the compound prefix filter to <parent>-[BFT] so the counter spans all kinds under one parent. Pick the letter from force_kind at format time.
P2: Epic? Sub-tickets-of-sub-tickets aren't a thing today — compound IDs are one level deep. Keep that invariant; just swap the letter.
P3: Board/scanner already parses `<parent>-T<n>` via a regex or strip_prefix in ticket.rs — audit call sites for the T-literal and widen to [BFT].
P4: Tests: add cases in rs-hack-arch/tests/dogfood.rs covering mixed-kind allocation order under one parent, and a legacy-bare-T01-coexistence case.
verify: cargo run -- board claim --kind bug --parent R011 prints R011-B<n>; --kind feature prints R011-F<n>; counters share one sequence
End-to-end smoke in temp workspace: --kind bug/feature/task/bug under one parent → R001-B1, R001-F2, R001-T3, R001-B4 (unified counter, kind letter)
gotchas: ticket.rs parses compound IDs in several places (epic inference at line ~369, sub-ticket matching at ~337) — all of them currently hardcode -T. Miss one and the new B/F IDs become invisible to the board.
assumes: Assumes no external tooling greps for literal -T<n> in source; if anything does (CI, docs, scripts), it'll need updating in lockstep.
